monoruby × ruby --yjit

Per-benchmark relative speed against ruby 4.0.1 --yjit, measured on every master push with Shopify/yjit-bench (--rss --harness=harness-warmup). Failed benchmarks are listed in red. Source: latest.json, history.csv. Back to portal.

Latest snapshot
